name: localization-i18n
description: Software & content localization engineering team — 3 agents (i18n-architect, localization-engineer, localization-qa) for shipping software in many languages: internationalization architecture (ICU MessageFormat, CLDR/locale data, pluralization & gender/select, RTL/bidi, date/number/currency formatting, translation-key strategy, library choice — i18next / FormatJS / gettext / platform-native), the localization pipeline (string extraction & catalogs, TMS integration, file formats PO/XLIFF/ARB/.strings/JSON, pseudo-localization, CI continuous translation), and localization QA (linguistic + functional QA, layout/truncation/overflow, locale & RTL testing, in-context review, regression). Decision-tree knowledge bank, 8 best-practices, 3 skills, 3 commands, 2 templates, 1 advisory hook, scenarios. Seams: UI implementation -> frontend-engineering & mobile-engineering; docs localization -> technical-writing-docs; design/RTL visual -> web-design. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
